name: part_000
file: tmp_【Sneak Peak】hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE Chromatic Future【#holoIDChromaticFuture 】 [GvDwA90OOuU]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_000.webm

scenes.description: Opening credits with sponsors over aerial shots of Jakarta.
Hololive ID members shown in various city locations (cafe, street, crosswalk).
Individual member introduction cards featuring character art and names.
Highlights from the hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE, showing stage performances and audience messages.
Decorative banners featuring individual member symbols hanging above the arena.
Live performance segment of the song '100%'.

subtitles.original: supported by Pocky ACL (ANIME COLLECTIVE LAB.)
subtitles.english: supported by Pocky ACL (ANIME COLLECTIVE LAB.)

subtitles.original: Ayunda Risu
subtitles.english: Ayunda Risu

subtitles.original: Kureiji Ollie
subtitles.english: Kureiji Ollie

subtitles.original: Vestia Zeta
subtitles.english: Vestia Zeta

subtitles.original: Moona Hoshinova
subtitles.english: Moona Hoshinova

subtitles.original: Anya Melfissa
subtitles.english: Anya Melfissa

subtitles.original: Kaela Kovalskia
subtitles.english: Kaela Kovalskia

subtitles.original: Airani Iofifteen
subtitles.english: Airani Iofifteen

subtitles.original: Pavolia Reine
subtitles.english: Pavolia Reine

subtitles.original: Kobo Kanaeru
subtitles.english: Kobo Kanaeru

subtitles.original: TERIMA KASIH!
subtitles.english: THANK YOU!

subtitles.original: Ayo mulai!!
subtitles.english: Let's start!!

subtitles.original: Welcome to Chromatic Future.
subtitles.english: Welcome to Chromatic Future.

subtitles.original: 身も心も...
subtitles.english: Both body and soul...

subtitles.original: この手で Make you mine
subtitles.english: With these hands, I'll make you mine

subtitles.original: 君を見るたび　上書きされてく欲望に
subtitles.english: Every time I see you, my desires are overwritten

subtitles.original: 重なる eyes, eyes, eyes　目を逸らす smile, smile, smile
subtitles.english: Overlapping eyes, eyes, eyes; a smile, smile, smile that turns away

subtitles.original: ねえ　その姿かたち　すべてが拍車かけていく
subtitles.english: Hey, that look and shape of yours only spur me on

subtitles.original: 故意から I, I, I　毎秒おかしくなっていく
subtitles.english: From this intent, I, I, I am going crazy every second

subtitles.original: 手を伸ばせば届く距離　1mmも逃したくない
subtitles.english: A distance within reach, I don't want to miss even 1mm

subtitles.original: 穏やかに恋したい　どんなシーンも私に見せて
subtitles.english: I want to love calmly; show me every scene of yours

subtitles.original: このまま stay by my side　どこにも行かないで
subtitles.english: Stay by my side just like this; don't go anywhere

subtitles.original: 100% 煽って　純粋な愛だから
subtitles.english: 100% fueling it, because it's pure love

subtitles.original: 止められない感情　その腕で抱きしめてよ
subtitles.english: Unstoppable emotions; hold me in those arms

subtitles.original: もっと　ここからだよ　ずっと　もっと近くで
subtitles.english: More, it starts from here; forever, even closer

subtitles.original: 認めあいたいほど　持て余す恋なら spice
subtitles.english:
The more we want to acknowledge each other,
the more this unmanageable love is a spice

subtitles.original: Hey me, what's wrong with me? Tell me　名も無き美津だし
subtitles.english:
Hey me, what's wrong with me? Tell me,
it's a nameless pouring sweetness

subtitles.original: I know　君の全部知りたい　I do need you 今すぐ
subtitles.english:
I know, I want to know everything about you;
I do need you right now

subtitles.original: 最初は声を聞く　それだけで良かった
subtitles.english: At first, just hearing your voice was enough

subtitles.original: だけど次第に　愛　わがままになった
subtitles.english: But gradually, my love became selfish

subtitles.original: 誰かに笑いかけ　その仕草に苛立ち
subtitles.english: You smile at someone else, and that gesture irritates me

subtitles.original: 隠せない自分に気づいた
subtitles.english: I realized I couldn't hide it

subtitles.original: 独り占めしたい　いっそ鎖に繋いで
subtitles.english: I want to have you all to myself; I'd rather tie you with chains

subtitles.original: 二人きりの部屋　近距離　強硬発言封じたい
subtitles.english:
Alone in a room together, up close;
I want to seal off any forced words

subtitles.original: 想い捨てて眠りたい　鋭い棘　感じさせて
subtitles.english:
I want to throw away these thoughts and sleep;
let me feel the sharp thorns

subtitles.original: 100% 煽って　私だけに依存してね
subtitles.english: 100% fueling it, depend only on me

subtitles.original: 歪（いびつ）な愛　まるごと受け止めてよ
subtitles.english: Acceptance of this distorted love, all of it

subtitles.original: ずっと　私達は　たとえ　吐き気しそうな
subtitles.english: Always we will be, even if it feels nauseating

subtitles.original: 甘い焦燥　抗（あらが）いきれない絶対
subtitles.english: This sweet impatience, something I absolutely can't resist

subtitles.original: Hey me, what's wrong with me? Tell me　名も無き美津だし
subtitles.english:
Hey me, what's wrong with me? Tell me,
it's a nameless pouring sweetness

subtitles.original: I know　君の全部知りたい　I do need you 今すぐ
subtitles.english:
I know, I want to know everything about you;
I do need you right now

subtitles.original: 目を閉じたら　とめどない愛感　触れたい
subtitles.english:
When I close my eyes, there's an endless feeling
of love I want to touch

subtitles.original: 私の歌　私だけ
subtitles.english: My song, only for me

subtitles.original: このまま stay by my side　二度と離れないで
subtitles.english: Stay by my side just like this; never leave again

subtitles.original: 100% 煽（あお）って　純粋な愛だから
subtitles.english: 100% fueling it, because it's pure love
